title: Maces Reforged
description: This packs adds new renamable models for the new weapon, The Mace
body:
### What the pack adds:
>    This pack adds a lot more dynamic models for the Mace,\
>    I have adapted [GillsBills](https://modrinth.com/user/GillsBills) Creator mobs idea for this pack.\
> Therefore this pack adds Maces that i like to call "Creator Maces". It is a branch of Maces that are made by the creators
### Note
>    And i will say the vanilla Mace should have been 3d. :P


### Why do you want to download this pack:
>   Cool and better Mace models
> ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dc08148090c804bf98879f76191982505229086.png)
> ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec16fe46fee61782beebf28865725a735aabdd1.png)
---
### Names
> - Astral Annihilator
> - Butter Batterer
> - Claw Crusher
> - Fungi Mallet
> - Mint Oreo
> - Molten Monarch
> - Silver Strike
> - Soul Sledge
> - Splat Roller
> - Wardens Wrath
> - Withering Wallop

- ### Issues/requests/Ideas
> **_X_ is not working!:**\
Report it to my discord

>**Wow great pack, but I would like to....!:**\
>If you have any requests 
>suggest them in my discord, I am mostly active there

>**Omg, I just got an amazing idea!:**\
suggest the idea in my discord, if you want to.

>**Using assets:**\
Sorry i do not allow usage of my assets

- ### Requires what mod?
> - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
> - Optifine
